## Problem
<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you like Depwire to solve this? -->

## Example Usage
<!-- Show what the feature would look like in use -->
```bash
depwire example-command --new-flag
```

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other solutions did you consider? Why is this the best approach? -->

## Impact
<!-- How would this affect existing users? Breaking change? Opt-in? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, mockups, or references -->
